hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The channel name is 'noticed:notification:' followed by a base64-encoded string representing the resource identifier (e.g., 6uid://domain/User/1), which decodes to '/domain/User/1'.
The request is forwarded to hooks.slack.com, which is the official Slack API routing subdomain for incoming webhooks.
Counting the migration script artifacts generated in the output directory yields exactly 1 file.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature10_payload_serialization.json.description: Payload serialization round-trips application records across supported column storage types.

feature11_email_delivery.json.description: Email channel sends immediately, can enqueue mail, validates configuration, and returns mail messages.

feature12_websocket_delivery.json.description: Realtime channel broadcasts payloads and resolves channel selectors.

feature13_http_delivery.json.description: Webhook and SMS HTTP channels send POST requests, expose responses, log debug output, and normalize failures.

feature14_push_delivery_helpers.json.description: Mobile push helpers resolve credentials, tokens, message payloads, and configuration errors.

feature15_translations.json.description: Notification text lookup supports plain keys, scoped keys, custom scopes, and HTML-safe values.

feature16_model_generator.json.description: The model generator creates a notification model file and matching migration.

feature1_parameter_payloads.json.description: Notification instances preserve supplied payload fields for delivery.

feature2_validation_errors.json.description: Required payload fields and delivery options are validated before delivery.

feature3_immediate_delivery.json.description: Immediate delivery creates records and invokes non-database channels for recipients.

cases.expected_output:
result_kind=recipient_results
records_created=1
test_deliveries=1
last_record_type=notification
last_recipient_email=first@example.com
last_param_foo=bar
delivered_record_matches=true
delivered_recipient_email=first@example.com

feature4_async_scheduling.json.description: Queued delivery records job count, queue names, and scheduled timestamps.

cases.expected_output:
enqueued_jobs=2
job_0_channel=test
job_0_queue=default
job_1_channel=realtime
job_1_queue=default
records_created=1

feature5_conditional_delivery.json.description: Conditional delivery predicates can suppress or allow channel execution while seeing the recipient.

feature6_callbacks.json.description: Notification and channel callbacks execute around delivery.

feature7_database_delivery.json.description: Database delivery persists notification records with payload and returns created records.

feature8_read_state.json.description: Stored notifications expose read and unread state transitions and scopes.

feature9_record_associations.json.description: Application records can query and clean up notifications that reference them in payload params.

_constraints.output_rule: Output must return count of params and normalized key=value pairs
Output must report validation error with specific missing parameter path

_constraints.input_condition: command is 'deliver_now' with recipients and params
_constraints.output_rule: Output must report recipient results, record creation count, channel invocations, and last processed metadata
Output must report enqueued job count, channel names, queue names, and synchronous record creation count

_constraints.input_condition: command is 'conditional_delivery' with kind 'if' and negative predicate
_constraints.output_rule: Output must report zero deliveries when predicate evaluates to false
Output must list lifecycle callbacks in specific order
Output must report record creation count, recipient record count, and last param value
Output must reflect state transition from false to true and counts
Output must report association count delta
Output must report column kind, roundtripped email, and coder kind
Output must report sent email count, message kind, and recipient email
Output must report broadcast channel (with URL encoded ID), count delta, and payload field
Output must report request host, status code, and response body for specific service
Output must report credential keys and expanded key-value pairs
Output must report lookup key and rendered message
Output must confirm model file existence and migration count
message field must use format 'missing_param=<param_path>'

_constraints.input_condition: immediate or queued delivery with payload storage
_constraints.output_rule: delivered_record_matches must be true; delivered_recipient_email must match input
No delivery impact on channel execution, but predicate value reflected in output
Output must report normalized HTTP failure with status and body
